```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./src/answer.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  formatNumber: () => (/* reexport safe */ _plugin_formatNumber__rspack_import_0["default"])
});
/* import */ var _plugin_formatNumber__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./src/plugin/formatNumber.js");




},
"./src/index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _answer__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./src/answer.js");

console.log(_answer__rspack_import_0);


},
"./src/plugin/formatNumber.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (formatNumber_default)
});
function formatNumber(config) {}
const plugin = cls => {
	cls.prototype.formatNumber = formatNumber;
};
var formatNumber_default = plugin;



},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./src/index.js"));

}
]);
```
